Recently I purchased a Samsung 385 Litres 2 Star Double Door Convertible Refrigerator and a Panasonic 1 Ton Split AC from Croma Chrompet. Right from the start till the end, the entire process was handled very smoothly. The sales executives, Abirami and Kamil, were very knowledgeable. They explained the features and differences between multiple brands & products (for both the refrigerator & AC) in detail. They were also extremely patient and provided clarifications for every query from our end (our query session alone went for 1-2 hours). This helped us narrow down our options on the products we needed. They even explained the benefits of maintenance warranty in details. The installation was also done very well by the respective brands teams. Thanks Croma Chrompet for helping us making an informed purchase.

If youre looking for a place to buy electronic items at great prices
look no further than Good Shop
Here s why this shop stands out: Low Prices: The shop offers electronic items at significantly lower prices compared to e-commerce platforms
I got a laptop here at a much lower price than what I found online
Great Deals: You can find fantastic deals on a variety of electronic products
making it an excellent place to save money
Wide Selection: The shop offers a broad range of electronic items
from laptops and smartphones to accessories and gadgets
catering to all your tech needs
Friendly Staff: The staff is knowledgeable and helpful
providing good customer service and assistance with your purchases
No Additional Warranty Cost: While the additional warranty can be quite expensive (around 8k for one year)
the initial savings on the product itself can make it a worthwhile option
Good Shop provides a great shopping experience for those looking to purchase electronics at competitive prices
Even though the additional warranty might be costly
the significant savings on the purchase price make it a fantastic place to shop for electronics

I recently purchased an air conditioner from Tata Chroma in Mogappair, and I must say, the experience was outstanding, thanks to Manjula. From the moment I walked into the store, she provided exceptional customer service. Manjula was incredibly knowledgeable about the various AC models and helped me choose the perfect one to meet my needs and budget. She patiently answered all my questions, explaining the features and benefits of each model in a clear and concise manner. Her expertise and professionalism were evident throughout the process, making the entire purchasing experience smooth and hassle-free. What truly stood out was Manjulas dedication to ensuring customer satisfaction. She went above and beyond to make sure the delivery and installation were scheduled at my convenience. Manjulas commitment to excellent service and her friendly demeanor made this one of the best shopping experiences Ive had. I highly recommend visiting Tata Chroma in Mogappair and asking for Manjula if youre in the market for an AC or any other electronic appliances. Reliance Digital has consistently proven to be a reliable destination for all things tech. The vast array of products, from smartphones to home appliances, ensures that youll find what youre looking for. The staff is knowledgeable and ready to assist without being pushy. The stores organized layout makes browsing easy, and the prices are competitive. The after-sales service is commendable, ensuring that any issues are addressed promptly. The warranty and return policies provide an added layer of assurance for customers. While the store might not have the charm of smaller, specialized shops, the sheer convenience and reliability of Reliance Digital make it a go-to choice for tech enthusiasts. Overall, a solid option for anyone seeking a hassle-free tech shopping experience.
